raw_consumer_statement: Two days ago, I received an email from Home Depot thanking me for purchasing {$1000.00} of lumber in XXXX, CA. However, I live in Oklahoma. I logged into my Home Depot Pro Account to find that nearly {$4000.00} in purchases is associated with my account, using a card I DID NOT OPEN and DO NOT OWN. I attempted to call and remedy this situation, but their credit department requires a social security number ( mine was not accepted ) or an account number ( for an account I Dont Have. ) I am at an impasse and refuse to fight with their automated system just to try and counter what is either some very foolish fraud, or a glitch in their systems, any longer. Needless to say : DO NOT OPEN A PRO ACCOUNT. Do not trust Home Depot with your information.
